sentences.target: Mein Onkel geht nächstes Jahr in Rente.
sentences.reading: /maɪn ˈɔŋkl̩ ɡeːt ˈnɛːçstəs jaːʁ ɪn ˈʁɛntə/

translations.de: Mein Onkel geht nächstes Jahr in Rente.
translations.ipa: /maɪn ˈɔŋkl̩ ɡeːt ˈnɛːçstəs jaːʁ ɪn ˈʁɛntə/
translations.en: My uncle is retiring next year.
translations.es: Mi tío se jubila el año que viene.
translations.fr: Mon oncle prend sa retraite l’année prochaine.
translations.it: Mio zio va in pensione l'anno prossimo.
translations.ru: Мой дядя выходит на пенсию в следующем году.
translations.pt: Meu tio vai se aposentar no ano que vem.
translations.he: הדוד שלי יוצא לפנסיה בשנה הבאה.
translations.vi: Chú tôi sẽ nghỉ hưu vào năm sau.
translations.nl: Mijn oom gaat volgend jaar met pensioen.
translations.uk: Мій дядько виходить на пенсію наступного року.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा अगले साल रिटायर होंगे.
translations.pl: Mój wujek przechodzi na emeryturę w przyszłym roku.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου βγαίνει στη σύνταξη του χρόνου.
translations.nb: Onkelen min går av med pensjon neste år.
translations.id: Paman saya akan pensiun tahun depan.
translations.sv: Min farbror går i pension nästa år.
translations.ro: Unchiul meu se pensionează anul viitor.
translations.cs: Můj strýc půjde příští rok do důchodu.
translations.da: Min onkel går på pension næste år.
translations.ja: おじは来年退職します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Onkel'; nominative masculine singular (1st person singular possessor).
Masculine noun; nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'geht'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate. With PP 'in Rente' forms the idiom 'in Rente gehen' (to retire).
Attributive adjective agreeing with 'Jahr'; neuter accusative singular; part of a temporal accusative phrase.
Neuter noun; accusative singular used as temporal accusative; adverbial time expression.
Preposition governing accusative here (goal/state); introduces PP 'in Rente' complementing 'geht'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular as object of 'in'; part of the idiom 'in Rente gehen' (to retire).

sentences.target: Die Rente reicht ihr gerade so zum Leben.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʁɛntə ʁaɪçt iːɐ̯ ɡəˈʁaːdə zoː tsʊm ˈleːbən/

translations.de: Die Rente reicht ihr gerade so zum Leben.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʁɛntə ʁaɪçt iːɐ̯ ɡəˈʁaːdə zoː tsʊm ˈleːbən/
translations.en: The pension is barely enough for her to live.
translations.es: Su pensión apenas le alcanza para vivir.
translations.fr: Sa pension lui suffit tout juste pour vivre.
translations.it: La sua pensione le basta appena per vivere.
translations.zh-Hans: 她的养老金勉强够维持生活。
translations.yue: 佢嘅退休金勉強夠佢生活。
translations.ru: Ей пенсии едва хватает на жизнь.
translations.pt: A aposentadoria mal dá para ela viver.
translations.he: הפנסיה שלה בקושי מספיקה לה כדי להתקיים.
translations.tr: Emekli maaşı onun geçinmesine zar zor yetiyor.
translations.vi: Lương hưu của cô ấy chỉ vừa đủ để sống.
translations.nl: Haar pensioen is net genoeg om van rond te komen.
translations.uk: Її пенсії ледве вистачає на життя.
translations.hu: A nyugdíja épphogy elég a megélhetésre.
translations.hi: उसकी पेंशन से बस किसी तरह गुज़ारा होता है.
translations.pl: Jej emerytura ledwo wystarcza na życie.
translations.el: Η σύνταξή της μόλις που της φτάνει για να ζει.
translations.nb: Pensjonen hennes er så vidt nok til å leve av.
translations.sv: Hennes pension räcker precis till att leva på.
translations.ro: Pensia ei abia îi ajunge să trăiască.
translations.cs: Její důchod jí sotva stačí na živobytí.
translations.da: Hendes pension rækker kun lige til at leve af.
translations.fi: Hänen eläkkeensä riittää vain juuri ja juuri elämiseen.
translations.ja: 彼女の年金は生活するのにぎりぎりだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Rente'.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'reicht'.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; 'reichen' (to suffice) taking a dative experiencer and purpose PP.
Personal pronoun; dative singular feminine; indirect/experiencer argument of 'reicht'.
Adverb modifying 'reicht'; part of the collocation 'gerade so' meaning 'only just/barely'.
Adverb intensifier; completes 'gerade so' (barely).
Contraction of 'zu dem' (preposition + definite article); 'zu' governs dative; introduces a purpose PP.
Neuter noun; dative singular governed by 'zu'; purpose complement in 'zum Leben' (for living).

translations.pt: Estou guardando dinheiro para a aposentadoria.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tiết kiệm cho lúc nghỉ hưu.
translations.hi: मैं रिटायरमेंट के लिए बचत कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 老後のために貯金しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; main predicate.
Preposition governing accusative; marks purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Rente'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular as object of 'für'; purpose ('for retirement').

sentences.target: Er wartet noch auf seine Rente.

translations.de: Er wartet noch auf seine Rente.
translations.en: He is still waiting for his pension.
translations.es: Él todavía está esperando su pensión.
translations.fr: Il attend encore sa pension de retraite.
translations.it: Sta ancora aspettando la sua pensione.
translations.yue: 佢仲喺度等佢嘅退休金。
translations.ru: Он всё ещё ждёт свою пенсию.
translations.pt: Ele ainda está esperando o pagamento da aposentadoria.
translations.vi: Anh ấy vẫn đang chờ lương hưu.
translations.ar: هو ما زال ينتظر معاشه التقاعدي.
translations.nl: Hij wacht nog steeds op zijn pensioen.
translations.uk: Він досі чекає на свою пенсію.
translations.hi: वह अभी भी अपनी पेंशन का इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: On wciąż czeka na swoją emeryturę.
translations.nb: Han venter fortsatt på pensjonen sin.
translations.sv: Han väntar fortfarande på sin pension.
translations.cs: Pořád ještě čeká na svůj důchod.
translations.da: Han venter stadig på sin pension.
translations.ja: 彼はまだ年金を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular masculine; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; 'warten' commonly takes 'auf' + accusative for the awaited thing.
Temporal adverb modifying 'wartet' (still/yet).
Preposition; with 'warten' governs accusative; introduces the awaited object.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Rente'; feminine accusative singular; 3rd person singular masculine possessor.
Feminine noun; accusative singular as object of 'auf'; the thing awaited.
